title: Standard Biotools Dynamic Array 192.24: Load 4 uL
author: Standard BioTools

steps.title: Prepare the Samples, the Assays, and...
steps.instruction: Prepare the Samples, the Assays, and the IFC Referring as described in one of the following workflows from the Standard BioTools X9 User Guide: - Gene Expression Using the 192.24 IFC with TaqMan Assays - Genotyping Using the 192.24 IFC with SNP Type Assays - Genotyping Using the 192.24 IFC with TaqMan Assays

steps.title: Prepare two Sample Plates by transferring...
steps.instruction: Prepare two Sample Plates by transferring 6 µL of sample to all wells of two separate 96-well plates

steps.title: Prepare an Assay Plate by transferring...
steps.instruction: Prepare an Assay Plate by transferring 6 µL of assay to 24 wells of a 96-well plate 4. *NOTE*: All wells (indicated below in blue) must have liquid

steps.title: Centrifuge the Sample and Assay plates...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the Sample and Assay plates to ensure liquids are at the bottom of the wells

steps.title: Prepare the 192.24 IFC
steps.instruction: Prepare the 192.24 IFC: - Add control line fluid to the accumulators according to the workflow selected in step 1 (Indicated above by red arrows) - Remove the protective film from the bottom of the IFC

steps.title: Prepare a 1
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1.5 mL tube with 170 µL Standard Biotools Actuation Fluid (green)

steps.title: Prepare a 1
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1.5 mL tube with 370 µL Standard Biotools Pressure Fluid (red)
